FlowDefinition.description:
Bank Account Approval
When a Bank Account's Approval Status is set to'Approved', this flow runs. If this is the first approval, then the field First Approval Completed gets checked. For subsequent approvals, this flow pushes bank account values from 'Pending' fields into end user facing fields and the pending fields get cleared.
FlowDefinition.masterLabel: Prodigy - Bank Account - Approval Complete Populate Fields
